# El Metate

> El Metate — 5 locations. Menu and online ordering (pickup + delivery) per location.

## Locations
- [Dunlap](https://elmetatemexicanrestaurants.com/dunlap/): 16952 Rankin Ave Unit D, Dunlap, TN, 37327
- [Hixson](https://elmetatemexicanrestaurants.com/hixson/): 5922 Hixson Pike, Hixson, TN, 37343
- [Knoxville](https://elmetatemexicanrestaurants.com/knoxville/): 4221 Sam Walton Way, Knoxville, TN, 37938
- [Signal Mountain](https://elmetatemexicanrestaurants.com/signal-mountain/): 1238 Taft Hwy, Signal Mountain, TN, 37377
- [Soddy Daisy](https://elmetatemexicanrestaurants.com/soddy-daisy/): 9332 Dayton Pike #110, Soddy-Daisy, TN, 37379
